inputs.pattern: I start every important project at 60 % effort, then quit by week three.
inputs.dharmic_action: Commit to one project for 90 days with weekly accountability.

inputs.pattern: I say yes when I mean no and resent it for weeks afterward.
inputs.dharmic_action: Practice saying 'let me think about it' before any commitment.

inputs.pattern: Whenever I am anxious I find myself in front of the fridge at 11 p.m.
inputs.dharmic_action: Replace the fridge trip with five minutes of breath when the anxiety spikes.

inputs.pattern: I lose hours to short-form video and feel hollow afterward.
inputs.dharmic_action: Move all such apps to a buried folder; no scrolling after 9 p.m.

inputs.pattern: I escalate small disagreements with my spouse into hours of cold war.
inputs.dharmic_action: Pause for ten breaths before responding to anything that triggers me.

inputs.pattern: मैं अपने काम में बार-बार खुद को कमज़ोर साबित करता हूँ
inputs.dharmic_action: हर सुबह दस मिनट अपने काम का अवलोकन करूँगा

inputs.pattern: When I am low I stop replying to everyone and disappear for weeks.
inputs.dharmic_action: Send one honest text to one friend within 24 hours of the urge to hide.

inputs.pattern: I always quit right before it gets good.
